name: Rio Kuchlyan
taglineSuffix: , Kenan-Flagler Business School. Focused on credit, banking, and technology.
about: I'm Rio, a student at UNC Kenan-Flagler pursuing dual degrees in Business Administration and Computer Science. Outside of work I enjoy golf, watches, photography, and a running goal to visit every country.
This summer I'm interning as a Business Analyst at Capital One. Previously I did M&A due diligence at a PE firm, fintech API development, and I am co-founding Vektra, an AI supply chain platform.
seoDescription: Computer Science & Business at UNC-Chapel Hill, Kenan-Flagler Business School. Focused on credit, banking, and technology.
